positive: A stunning, symmetrical, maximalist bioluminescent jungle pattern featuring stylized exotic flora and fauna, such as glowing coral, intricate tropical leaves, and whimsical luminous insects. The composition should be presented as a cohesive central vignette or wreath, rendered in a high-contrast, Art Nouveau vector illustration style. Dominant color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, and midnight teal, dramatically illuminated by neon cyan, emerald green, and electric purple glowing accents. Clean lines, highly detailed, perfect for screen printing on apparel, clean silhouette.
negative: blur, noisy, low quality, watermark, signature, text, words, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, grayscale, boring, washed out, monochrome, realistic photo
